title: Rear queen bees
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Rear queen bees demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Establish breeding stock and obtain requirements for queen bee rearing

pcs.text: Select and obtain queen bee breeding stock according to breeding program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and obtain queen bee breeding stock according to breeding program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and obtain queen bee breeding stock according to breeding program.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, risks and implement controls according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, risks and implement controls according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, risks and implement controls according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Select and safely use tools and equipment required to rear queen bees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and safely use tools and equipment required to rear queen bees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and safely use tools and equipment required to rear queen bees.

pcs.text: Confirm site quarantine and other biosecurity protocols and ensure that they are followed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm site quarantine and other biosecurity protocols and ensure that they are followed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm site quarantine and other biosecurity protocols and ensure that they are followed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Establish breeding stock and obtain requirements for queen bee rearing

elements.title: Assess condition of colonies and nurse bees and prepare queen cups with larvae

pcs.text: Ensure hives and colonies used for queen bee and drone production are in a clean and healthy condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure hives and colonies used for queen bee and drone production are in a clean and healthy condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure hives and colonies used for queen bee and drone production are in a clean and healthy condition.

pcs.text: Select larvae from the breeder queen bee cells for grafting according to specification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select larvae from the breeder queen bee cells for grafting according to specification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select larvae from the breeder queen bee cells for grafting according to specification.

pcs.text: Select and prepare queen cups according to workplace procedures and production method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare queen cups according to workplace procedures and production method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare queen cups according to workplace procedures and production method.

pcs.text: Transfer larvae from worker cells into queen cell cups according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transfer larvae from worker cells into queen cell cups according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer larvae from worker cells into queen cell cups according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure an adequate number of nurse bees are present in cell raising colonies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure an adequate number of nurse bees are present in cell raising colonies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure an adequate number of nurse bees are present in cell raising colonies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess condition of colonies and nurse bees and prepare queen cups with larvae

elements.title: Establish and monitor the queen mating process

pcs.text: Transfer ripe queen cells into the nucleus after grafting according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transfer ripe queen cells into the nucleus after grafting according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer ripe queen cells into the nucleus after grafting according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Provide drones during mating period according to workplace standards and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide drones during mating period according to workplace standards and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide drones during mating period according to workplace standards and specifications.

pcs.text: Monitor and maintain hives in a healthy pest and disease free condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and maintain hives in a healthy pest and disease free condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and maintain hives in a healthy pest and disease free condition.

pcs.text: Maintain records of grafting and queen rearing activities according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of grafting and queen rearing activities according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Package queen bees for transport

pcs.text: Select type of queen cage suitable for transport according to workplace procedures and method of production

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select type of queen cage suitable for transport according to workplace procedures and method of production.

pcs.text: Capture mated queen bee and transfer to queen cage supported by young escort bees according to cage type and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Capture mated queen bee and transfer to queen cage supported by young escort bees according to cage type and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Capture mated queen bee and transfer to queen cage supported by young escort bees according to cage type and workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure queen cage is stocked with food and secured for transport.

pcs.text: Prepare package with queen bee cage and contents according to transport method and according to workplace and transport company procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare package with queen bee cage and contents according to transport method and according to workplace and transport company procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare package with queen bee cage and contents according to transport method and according to workplace and transport company procedures.
